message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Bizarre Lineage Kira: Complete Boss Raid & Solo Strategy Guide 2026",
  description: "Master the Bizarre Lineage Kira raid with our comprehensive guide. Learn solo cheese methods with White Snake and SSS rank tactics with Anubis in 2026.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/2d3436/dfe6e9?text=Bizarre+Lineage+Kira+Guide",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Bizarre Lineage Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Bizarre Lineage Kira**: The boss has approximately 2,500 HP and two distinct combat phases.
- **Top Stand Choices**: **White Snake** is best for solo cheese, while **Anubis** excels for SSS rank DPS.
- **Crucial Mechanic**: Watch for your character turning **red**; this signals the "Bites the Dust" explosion.
- **Solo Advantage**: The raid is significantly easier to solo as boss health scales with additional players.
- **Sheer Heart Attack**: Can be kited or bugged against specific ledges to prevent team wipes.
</Callout>

The **bizarre lineage kira** raid stands as one of the most significant challenges for players seeking to evolve their Stands or farm rare cosmetics in 2026. Yoshikage Kira, the primary antagonist of this raid, utilizes a combination of explosive Stand abilities and the deadly Sheer Heart Attack to punish unprepared challengers. Whether you are pursuing the S-rank for the Made in Heaven questline or simply looking for the most efficient way to farm Stand Arrows, understanding the underlying mechanics is essential.

In this guide, we will break down the most effective strategies for defeating Kira, including the specialized "White Snake Cheese" and the high-damage "Anubis Method." We will also cover essential stat builds, sub-ability synergies like Vampire and Hamon, and the specific movement tech required to avoid the "Bites the Dust" transformation. By the end of this article, you will have the knowledge required to consistently achieve SSS ranks and secure your place among the elite Stand users of Morioh-cho.

<Section icon={Map} title="Raid Overview and Preparation">

Before entering the **bizarre lineage kira** raid, players must understand the basic requirements and the scaling nature of the encounter. The raid is located within the Raid Portal Dimension and can be attempted by 1-4 players. However, veteran players strongly recommend soloing or bringing no more than one partner, as Kira's health pool increases dramatically with more participants.

| Raid Attribute | Detail |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Boss Name** | Yoshikage Kira / Killer Queen |
| **Approximate HP** | **2,500** (Solo scaling) |
| **Time Limit** | 10-15 Minutes |
| **Player Count** | 1-4 (Solo recommended) |
| **Primary Rewards** | Stand Arrows, Lucky Arrows, Cosmetics |
| **Key Danger** | Sheer Heart Attack / Bites the Dust |

Preparation is not just about having a high-level character; it is about choosing the right Stand and Fighting Style combination. While Legendary Stands like Star Platinum are powerful, the Kira raid favors Stands with specific crowd control or high-speed M1 (Light Attack) capabilities.

<Callout type="info" title="Team Composition Warning">
Avoid entering the raid with a full party of four unless you are highly coordinated. The health scaling makes the fight much longer, increasing the chances of someone failing a "Bites the Dust" dodge and causing a team wipe.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="The White Snake Solo Cheese Method">

The most reliable way to solo the **bizarre lineage kira** raid in 2026 involves using the **White Snake** Stand. This method relies on "cheesing" Kira's AI and managing Sheer Heart Attack through positioning rather than raw damage. The core of this strategy is the **Acid Rupture** ability, which creates a damaging puddle that disrupts the boss's movement.

**Video Highlights:**
- **Acid Rupture Utility**: Using the acid vat to continuously damage Kira while maintaining distance.
- **SHA Kiting**: Leading Sheer Heart Attack behind curved objects to bug its pathfinding.
- **Disc Extraction**: Shutting down Kira's abilities during critical phase transitions.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="f3oOUPMnzPo" title="White Snake Kira Solo Method" />

To execute this method effectively, you should ideally have the **Vampire** sub-ability for the **Leeching Terror** move, which provides necessary sustain if you take chip damage from explosions.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Initial Engagement">
    Enter the arena and immediately deploy **Acid Rupture**. Use **Revolver** and **Disc Throw** to keep Kira at mid-range.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Sheer Heart Attack Management">
    When Sheer Heart Attack (SHA) spawns, do not panic. Aggro the robot and lead it toward the curved walls or curbs at the edge of the arena.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="AI Pathing Bug">
    Hug the wall and dash around the corner. The SHA AI often gets stuck on the geometry, allowing you to return to Kira and fight him uninterrupted.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Final Phase Burst">
    Once Kira's health drops low, he will attempt "Bites the Dust." Use **Disc Extraction** or a heavy M2 attack to guard-break him and finish the fight.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Callout type="warning" title="Level Requirement">
This method is significantly easier if you are at least **Level 45+**. Lower levels may lack the Stand Power necessary to finish the boss before the timer expires or before multiple SHAs spawn.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Anubis SSS Rank Strategy">

If your goal is to achieve an **SSS Rank** in the **bizarre lineage kira** raid, the **Anubis** Stand is arguably the superior choice. Despite being a Rare tier Stand, Anubis possesses some of the highest M1 damage scaling in the game, allowing for rapid health depletion.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="High DPS Focus">
    Anubis relies on fast M1 chains. Focus on **Stand Power** and **Speed** stats to maximize your damage per second.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Dashing Mechanic">
    The key to SSS rank is taking zero damage. You must master the **Q-Dash** to avoid Kira's random explosive triggers.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Ledge Tactics">
    Similar to the WS method, Anubis users can use the arena ledges to separate Kira from his Sheer Heart Attack.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

The most critical mechanic to master with Anubis is the "Red Aura" visual cue. During the fight, your character's body will occasionally turn bright red. This indicates that Kira has "tagged" you with a bomb.

| Mechanic | Visual Cue | Required Action |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Primary Bomb** | Red Glow on Player | **Dash (Q)** immediately |
| **Bites the Dust** | Screen Flash/Kira Pose | **Guard Break** or **Evasive** |
| **SHA Aggro** | Blue Target Line | Lead to **Ledge/Wall** |
| **Stray Cat Air Bullets**| Visible Air Ripples | **Block (F)** or **Dodge** |

<Callout type="success" title="Pro SSS Tip">
To ensure an SSS rank, stick primarily to **M1 attacks** and the **R-move (Heavy)**. Using too many complex abilities can lock you into animations, making it impossible to dash when the red aura appears.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Optimal Builds and Stat Allocation">

Success in the **bizarre lineage kira** raid depends heavily on your stat distribution. A "Glass Cannon" build might work for experienced players, but a "Balanced" or "Tank" build is recommended for those still learning the boss patterns.

| Stat Type | Recommended Points | Reasoning |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Vitality** | **40 - 50** | Prevents being one-shot by stray bombs. |
| **Stand Power** | **30 - 40** | Essential for clearing the raid within the time limit. |
| **Durability** | **15 - 20** | Reduces chip damage from explosions. |
| **Speed** | **10 - 20** | Increases dash distance and attack frequency. |

**Recommended Sub-Abilities:**
1.  **Vampire**: Provides life-steal and high regeneration, which is vital for long-term sustain in the raid.
2.  **Hamon**: Increases overall damage output, especially useful if using Anubis or Star Platinum.
3.  **Cyborg**: Offers ranged poke options to keep Kira at a distance.

<Callout type="tip" title="Build Synergy">
Pairing **Anubis** with the **Boxing** fighting style creates a high-pressure build that can keep Kira staggered, preventing him from launching his more dangerous secondary abilities.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Raid Completion Checklist">

To ensure you are fully prepared for every encounter with Kira, use the following checklist before starting the raid portal.

<Checklist
  id="kira-raid-prep"
  title="Pre-Raid Essentials:"
  items={[
    "Reach at least Level 45 for optimal damage scaling",
    "Equip a Stand with high M1 speed or CC (WS/Anubis/SP)",
    "Unlock at least one Sub-Ability (Vampire or Hamon recommended)",
    "Set your spawn point at the Morioh-cho Town hub",
    "Ensure your 'Q' and 'F' keys are easily accessible for dodging",
    "Check for active codes to get free Stand Arrows or Resets"
  ]}
/>

<Callout type="warning" title="Death Penalty">
In Bizarre Lineage raids, if your teammate dies, the entire raid is often considered a failure for the SSS rank. Prioritize staying alive over dealing maximum damage.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Frequently Asked Questions">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "What is the best Stand for soloing the Kira raid?",
    answer: "White Snake is widely considered the best for soloing due to its Acid Rupture ability and the ability to extract Kira's Stand disc, effectively cheesing the fight."
  },
  {
    question: "How do I avoid the explosion when my character turns red?",
    answer: "As soon as you see your character model turn red, you must use your Dash (Q key). Timing is tight, so avoid being caught in long attack animations."
  },
  {
    question: "Why am I getting a lower rank even if I don't die?",
    answer: "Ranks in the bizarre lineage kira raid are determined by speed and damage taken. To get an SSS rank, you must finish quickly and take almost zero damage."
  },
  {
    question: "Can I use Hamon against Kira?",
    answer: "Yes, Hamon provides a significant damage boost to your M1s and abilities, making it a top-tier sub-ability for high-DPS builds like Anubis."
  }
]} />

</Section>
